title: pavonia semiserrata
intro: Pavonia semiserrata, also known as Rockrose or Heartleaf Pavonia, is a species of flowering plant in the family Malvaceae. It is native to the tropical regions of Central and South America and has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is valued for its health benefits, such as soothing skin irritations, reducing fever, and treating respiratory issues like bronchitis and asthma. The leaves and flowers of Pavonia semiserrata are used in herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to support overall well-being and promote a healthy immune system.
